mapper.select: SELECT DATE(h.inbound_time) AS record_date, COALESCE(SUM(d.quantity), 0) AS total_quantity FROM inbound_order_head h JOIN inbound_order_detail d ON h.inbound_no = d.inbound_no WHERE h.inbound_time >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE(h.inbound_time) ORDER BY record_date

SELECT DATE(h.outbound_time) AS record_date, COALESCE(SUM(d.quantity), 0) AS total_quantity FROM outbound_order_head h JOIN outbound_order_detail d ON h.outbound_no = d.outbound_no WHERE h.outbound_time >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE(h.outbound_time) ORDER BY record_date

SELECT w.warehouse_name, t.temperature, t.humidity, t.recorded_time FROM temperature_humidity_record t JOIN warehouse w ON t.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id WHERE t.recorded_time = ( SELECT MAX(t2.recorded_time) FROM temperature_humidity_record t2 WHERE t2.warehouse_id = t.warehouse_id ) ORDER BY w.warehouse_name
